JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF IS PRESENT W ATNY JOSEPH SACRAMENTO. DEFTS ARE PRESENT W ATNY ROBERT GARCIA. BOTH SIDES PRESENT ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE AND ENTER INTO STIPULATIONS. PLTF EXH 1,2,3,4 AND DEFT A, B ARE ENTERED INTO EVID. ARGUMENTS ARE PRESENTED. STATEMENT OF DECISION IS REQUESTED BY DEFT. BOTH SIDES SUBMIT THE CASE. EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED.
NOTICE OF FILING APPEAL MAILED TO RESPONDENT; COPY DELIVERED TO APPELLATE DEPARTMENT
MOTION TO TAX COSTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT RIVERA, ADAM RIVERA, NORMA HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
1ST REQUEST SENT TO REPORTER FOR ESTIMATE
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF DOCUMENTS

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 01, MOTION TO TAX COSTS, CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER IT IS ORDERED THAT DEFTS ADAM RIVERA AND NORMA RIVERA RECOVER FROM MIREK KUCERA AS ADDITIONAL COSTS OF SUIT THE SUM OF $4162.00 AND FOR THE ATY FEES OF ATY ROBERT P GARCIA.
IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO RULE 133(C).
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED
